rationale.fidelity: Preserves cutoff information, batching and routing decisions, cart and assignment constraints, distance objective, and all excluded mechanisms.
rationale.managerial_framing: Explains the joint batching-routing mechanism, consolidation trade-off, and a feasible benchmark comparison concretely.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Correctly declines a paper-level contribution claim but supplies no literature positioning.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Distinguishes modeled distance from labor, time, and cost effects, though its suggestion that lower distance may indicate burden remains a lightly supported inference.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear and structured but longer than necessary and affected by encoding artifacts.
rationale.overall: A faithful and operationally useful warehouse framing with appropriate exclusions and only a minor inferential caveat.
